item.title: She’s gonna be just fine when adopted 🥹 because i know some will ask… No, Angie isn’t adopting Roo, she just wanted to meet her 🩷 but she really is an animal whisperer. Rosie who isn’t a snuggly dog lays on her anytime she comes over 😂 #spicycat #fosterca
item.description: By @rosieandtheshelterpups: She’s gonna be just fine when adopted 🥹 because i know some will ask… No, Angie isn’t adopting Roo, she just wanted to meet her 🩷 but she really is an animal whisperer. Rosie who isn’t a snuggly dog lays on her anytime she comes over 😂 #spicycat #fosterca
